description:
Implement `hx-menu`, `hx-menu-item`, and `hx-menu-divider` (T2 tier) — 5/6 enterprise libraries ship this. Context menu with items, groups, and submenus.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-menu/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-menu.ts`, `hx-menu.styles.ts`, `hx-menu.stories.ts`, `hx-menu.test.ts`

**`hx-menu` props:** none (manages keyboard navigation of items)

**`hx-menu-item` props:** `value` (string), `disabled` (boolean), `checked` (boolean — for checkmark items), `type` (`normal`|`checkbox`), `loading` (boolean)

**`hx-menu-divider`:** no props, just a visual separator between menu sections

**Slots on `hx-menu`:** default (hx-menu-item and hx-menu-divider children)
**Slots on `hx-menu-item`:** `prefix` (icon), default (label), `suffix` (shortcut text/icon), `submenu` (nested hx-menu)

**Events:** `hx-select` on `hx-menu` with `{ item, value }`

**CSS Parts:** `hx-menu`: `base`; `hx-menu-item`: `base`, `prefix`, `label`, `suffix`, `submenu-icon`, `checked-icon`

**ARIA:** `hx-menu` gets `role="menu"`. Items get `role="menuitem"` (or `role="menuitemcheckbox"` for checkbox type). `aria-disabled`, `aria-checked`. Keyboard: Arrow Up/Down navigate, Enter/Space activate, Escape closes, Arrow Right opens submenu.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (keyboard nav, checkbox items, submenu, disabled items), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all patterns, bundle < 5KB combined.

Register all three in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-menu — T2 Context/Action Menu
